properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Born in Bethlehem's tiny, crowded town Raised in Nazareth, a King without a crown He sat with sinners, the lowly, and the lame Some didn't understand, but He was not ashamed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Isn't that why He came A poor, lost world to save To carry all our shame And heal the hurt away Bring hope to the hopeless Shield them from the blame Oh, isn't that why he came

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Dressed in tattered clothes, homeless and abused Only Heaven knows the things that he's been through It would've been easier to turn and walk away But Calvary compels our hearts to stay

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For the rich man in a mansion For the beggar on the street For the one who needs compassion For the strong and for the weak

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Isn't that why He came A poor, lost world to save To carry all our shame And heal the hurt away Bring hope to the hopeless Shield them from the blame Oh, isn't that why he came Oh, isn't that why he came
